problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: If Quantum annealing for optimization problems is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
